title: Space Cruiser mod
description: A mod that adds the famous ship from Rick and Morty
body:
This is a mod that adds the space cruiser from Rick and Morty.

Currently it can fly up and down and around, and throw bombs down.
Recipes to make most of the materials needed for the ship:



![Hardened Glass recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38fa6fa672ef14b99cb7664dce7303fe3a9bdb1d.png)


![Polished Iron recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab458591133fc9f40f0e0bcbd09a4c9c1cd9611d.png)

![Steel Ingot recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be4c0f58b009012aac05c3b84ec468ec703285ef.png)

![Wheel recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f16d1ccb27d69e601a454f289ad2c37ef3b9601.png)

![Scrap Garbage recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/593fddf81d47b3995cf482a56d7b12c25613b656.png)






![Space Cruiser Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6cfac5403748d4612fb353ab25448ae62c11264.png)
